steps.code:
'jane-smith', 'user_email' => 'jane@example.com', 'user_pass' => wp_generate_password(), 'display_name' => 'Jane Smith', 'description' => 'Senior product designer with 10 years of experience building digital products. Passionate about accessibility and design systems.', 'role' => 'author', ]); if ( ! is_wp_error( $user_id ) ) { update_user_meta( $user_id, 'apbl_author_position', 'Senior Product Designer' ); update_user_meta( $user_id, 'apbl_location', 'San Francisco, CA' ); update_user_meta( $user_id, 'apbl_department', 'Design' ); update_user_meta( $user_id, 'apbl_skills', 'Figma, Design Systems, Accessibility, UX Research' ); update_user_meta( $user_id, 'apbl_availability', 'available' ); update_user_meta( $user_id, 'apbl_social_profiles', serialize([ 'twitter' => 'https://twitter.com/janesmith', 'linkedin' => 'https://linkedin.com/in/janesmith', 'website' => 'https://janesmith.design', ]) ); } // Create second demo user $user_id_2 = wp_insert_user([ 'user_login' => 'alex-chen', 'user_email' => 'alex@example.com', 'user_pass' => wp_generate_password(), 'display_name' => 'Alex Chen', 'description' => 'Full-stack engineer specialising in WordPress block development and REST APIs. Open source contributor.', 'role' => 'author', ]); if ( ! is_wp_error( $user_id_2 ) ) { update_user_meta( $user_id_2, 'apbl_author_position', 'Lead Engineer' ); update_user_meta( $user_id_2, 'apbl_location', 'New York, NY' ); update_user_meta( $user_id_2, 'apbl_department', 'Engineering' ); update_user_meta( $user_id_2, 'apbl_skills', 'PHP, React, TypeScript, WordPress Blocks' ); update_user_meta( $user_id_2, 'apbl_availability', 'busy' ); update_user_meta( $user_id_2, 'apbl_social_profiles', serialize([ 'twitter' => 'https://twitter.com/alexchen', 'github' => 'https://github.com/alexchen', 'linkedin' => 'https://linkedin.com/in/alexchen', ]) ); } // Create Team Member CPT entries $tm_1 = wp_insert_post([ 'post_type' => 'apbl_team_member', 'post_title' => 'Maria Garcia', 'post_content' => 'Marketing strategist and content lead with a background in brand communications and growth marketing.', 'post_status' => 'publish', ]); if ( $tm_1 ) { update_post_meta( $tm_1, 'apbl_tm_position', 'Head of Marketing' ); update_post_meta( $tm_1, 'apbl_tm_social_profiles', serialize([ 'linkedin' => 'https://linkedin.com/in/mariagarcia', 'twitter' => 'https://twitter.com/mariagarcia', ]) ); $dept = wp_insert_term( 'Marketing', 'apbl_department' ); if ( ! is_wp_error( $dept ) ) { wp_set_object_terms( $tm_1, (int) $dept['term_id'], 'apbl_department' ); } } $tm_2 = wp_insert_post([ 'post_type' => 'apbl_team_member', 'post_title' => 'David Park', 'post_content' => 'Operations lead focused on scaling teams and building efficient cross-functional processes.', 'post_status' => 'publish', ]); if ( $tm_2 ) { update_post_meta( $tm_2, 'apbl_tm_position', 'VP of Operations' ); update_post_meta( $tm_2, 'apbl_tm_social_profiles', serialize([ 'linkedin' => 'https://linkedin.com/in/davidpark', ]) ); $ops_dept = wp_insert_term( 'Operations', 'apbl_department' ); if ( ! is_wp_error( $ops_dept ) ) { wp_set_object_terms( $tm_2, (int) $ops_dept['term_id'], 'apbl_department' ); } } // Create demo page with blocks $admin = get_users(['role' => 'administrator', 'number' => 1]); $admin_id = $admin ? $admin[0]->ID : 1; $page_content = '

Author Profile Block

Single author displayed with the default card style.

Author Grid Block

Multiple authors displayed in a responsive 3-column grid.

Author List Block

Authors displayed in the detailed list style.

Author Carousel Block

Authors displayed in a scrollable carousel.

Shortcode Examples

[apbl_grid columns="2" number="4" style="card"] '; $page_id = wp_insert_post([ 'post_type' => 'page', 'post_title' => 'Author Profile Blocks Demo', 'post_content' => $page_content, 'post_status' => 'publish', 'post_author' => $admin_id, ]); if ( $page_id ) { update_option( 'page_on_front', $page_id ); update_option( 'show_on_front', 'page' ); }

options.blogdescription: Live preview of the Author Profile Blocks plugin
